behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: collectors -> aggregation payload -> summary step input. A unit test on one function would miss wiring/field-mapping omissions across modules (MOCK-MISS). Real OS/network/subprocess is not required because source clients can be in-process fakes returning representative payloads (REAL-INFRA no). No dependence on model judgment/output quality; only input assembly correctness is checked (LLM-DEP no). Rejected higher levels: behavior text is only about what is passed into summary generation, not about real HTTP/email/LLM output.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real collector/assembler modules with three in-process fake source adapters, run report build, and assert the exact payload handed to summary generation contains required sections/keys from metrics, issue tracker, and deployment log.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module error propagation/fallback behavior (source adapter error -> report composer note), so Unit is too low (MOCK-MISS). In-process fakes can deterministically raise timeout/exception to reproduce unavailability handling; real network/OS is not required for this behavior itself (REAL-INFRA no). No AI output-quality dependence (LLM-DEP no). Rejected System/Agentic: behavior text is about fallback logic and continuation, not real transport quirks or model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Run report generation with two fake sources returning data and one fake source raising an availability error; assert process does not abort and final report includes `data unavailable` in only the failed section.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the real summary model generates (faithfulness to key values). A stubbed summarizer would always pass and hide hallucination/omission/regression failures (MOCK-HIDE, LLM-DEP yes). Not Workflow because this behavior asks for one model decision quality check, not multiple agentic stages in sequence. Rejected lower levels: behavior text explicitly evaluates narrative accuracy, which is model-output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Feed controlled report inputs with known key values to the real summary-generation model and score output for factual inclusion/correctness against those values (e.g., required-value checks across repeated runs with acceptance threshold).

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary includes real external interfaces: source APIs plus actual email delivery to inbox (REAL-INFRA yes). In-process mocks can hide SMTP/API auth, delivery, MIME, and inbox-routing failures (MOCK-HIDE). The behavior does not require judging narrative quality; it checks end-to-end delivery correctness, so Agentic is not required by the stated assertion (REJECTION-GATE: text says reaches inbox correctly, not that model output is semantically correct). Not Workflow: no explicit multi-agentic decision chain is being validated.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the scheduled job in an environment with reachable test instances of the three sources and a real test mailbox; assert the email is received by configured recipient and contains the generated report sections.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Behavior depends on real filesystem persistence across runs and real delivery-service unreachability handling timing/state (REAL-INFRA yes). Mocks often miss path/permission/atomic-write and retry-on-next-run state carryover failures (MOCK-HIDE). No dependence on model output quality (LLM-DEP no). Rejected Workflow/Agentic: behavior text is delivery-failure recovery and retry orchestration, not model-decision quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run job with email endpoint intentionally unreachable; verify fallback file is created on disk with report content, then run next scheduled invocation with email restored and assert queued report is sent and fallback state is cleared/updated.
